header.searchPlaceholder: Search for a part, reference or brand...
footer.description: %brandName% – Specialist in quality reconditioned auto parts. We offer a wide range of tested parts for all makes and models.
footer.address: Head office: 50 Boulevard Stalingrad, 06300 Nice, France
footer.newsletterDesc: Receive our latest technical offers and promotions directly in your inbox.
cookie.message: This site uses cookies necessary for operation (e.g. cart, login). You can accept or decline non-essential cookies.
consent.banner.title: Your cookie preferences
consent.banner.body: We use cookies to measure site traffic and show you relevant ads. You can accept, decline or customize your choices at any time. Learn more in our privacy policy.
consent.modal.title: Customize cookies
consent.modal.intro: You control which cookies are stored on your device. Strictly necessary cookies are always active.
consent.modal.necessary.title: Necessary cookies
consent.modal.necessary.desc: Required for cart, login and security. Always active.
consent.modal.analytics.title: Analytics
consent.modal.analytics.desc: Helps us understand how you use the site (page views, checkout funnel) so we can improve it.
consent.modal.ads.title: Personalized ads
consent.modal.ads.desc: Allows us to show relevant ads and measure their effectiveness (Google Ads, retargeting).
whatsapp.tooltip: Need help? Contact us on WhatsApp
whatsapp.message: Hello, I have a question about a part...
product.noProductDesc: This product cannot be displayed at the moment.
product.noConfigNeeded: This reference does not require additional configuration before adding to cart.
product.techCanConfirm: Our technicians can confirm the right reference with your VIN or original part information.
product.noCompat: No compatibility information available for this product.
product.noReconditioning: No reconditioning information for this product.
product.qualityProcessDesc: Each step is designed to ensure a controlled, durable, and ready-to-install part.
product.exchangeStep1: You receive the reconditioned and tested part.
product.exchangeStep2: You or your mechanic installs the part.
product.exchangeStep3: Contact us to arrange the return of the old part, by driver or pickup point, within 30 days.
product.exchangeNote: No deposit is required at the time of order. If the old part is not returned within 30 days, the deposit will be charged.
product.consigneUpfront: Deposit of %amount% € (core charge, excl. VAT) charged at checkout, fully refunded when you return your old part within %days% days.
product.consigneOnReturn: No deposit is charged at checkout. If the old part is not returned after %days% days, the deposit will be invoiced.
product.compatWarning: Always compare your part reference and your VIN before final validation.
cart.error: Unable to add the product to cart.
cart.addError: Unable to add the product to cart at this time.
cart.emptyDesc: Add a product from the catalog.
cart.consigneNoteTop: Incl. %amount% € deposit, fully refunded when you return your old part.
cart.consigneRefund: Refunded when you return your old part
checkout.accountAutoCreated: An account will be created automatically after your order
checkout.billingUsesShipping: Billing will use the same address as shipping.
checkout.invoiceToShipping: The invoice will be sent to your shipping address.
checkout.moreMethods: + more methods depending on your bank
checkout.compatCheckText: : we check your part's compatibility before shipping. Provide either the French plate or the VIN (chassis number).
checkout.useVin: Non-French plate / no plate → use the VIN
checkout.plateUsage: Plate/VIN used only to check compatibility and/or program your part. No other use.
checkout.smsOptIn: I agree to receive tracking SMS for my order (shipping, delivery, reminders).
checkout.unsubscribeAnytime: You can unsubscribe at any time from your account area.
checkout.consigneNotePayment: Incl. %amount% € deposit — fully refunded when you return your old part. This is not an extra cost.
category.noProductDesc: No products are currently available in this category.
blog.comeBack: Check back soon for new content.
blog.subscribersDesc: Over 10,000 enthusiasts receive our monthly technical guides and exclusive offers. Join us!
blog.monthlyDesc: Receive our technical guides and exclusive offers every month.
listing.noResultsDesc: Try removing a filter or changing your search.

error.demo.desc: The site is running without a database, using sample products.
checkout.guestAccountNote: Once the order is confirmed, we'll automatically create your account and you'll receive an email to set your password.
home.findPart: Find the part for your vehicle
home.qualityDesc: All our parts are rigorously tested and guaranteed for up to 24 months.
home.flexPayDesc: Pay easily in 3 or 4 installments. Immediate and 100% secure financing.
home.expressDesc: Optimized logistics: same-day shipping and precise real-time parcel tracking.
home.discoverDesc: A selection of exceptional parts ready to ship.
home.blogDesc: Automotive news and our maintenance guides.
home.needHelpDesc: Our experts are available by phone or email to recommend the exact reference compatible with your vehicle.
contact.introContact: A question? Need help with a reference or compatibility? Write to us, we reply quickly.
contact.introDevis: Tell us what you need (reference, VIN, vehicle) and we'll reply quickly with the right part at the right price.
contact.tip: Tip: for perfect compatibility, provide the VIN (17 characters) or license plate if possible, and/or the part's OEM reference.
contact.vinHint: You'll find it on the registration document (field E) or on the vehicle.
contact.plateHint: If you don't have the VIN, the plate can help.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.phMessage: Describe your need: vehicle, reference, symptom, OEM number…
contact.privacyNote: We never share your email. Reply usually within 24 business hours.
contact.metaContact: Contact %brand%: question, support, compatibility. Quick reply by email or phone.
contact.metaDevis: Quote request: send your reference, VIN and needs. Quick reply by email or phone.
contact.msgSent: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you quickly.
contact.msgTooMany: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
contact.msgWaitSecond: Please wait a second then resubmit the form.
contact.msgTooShort: Your message is too short. Please give a few more details.
contact.msgSendFailed: Your message could not be sent. Try again later or contact us by phone.
product.consigneRefundShort: Deposit %amount% € (excl. VAT) refunded on return within %days% days
product.exchangeNoDeposit: Standard exchange, no deposit • Return old part within %days% days
product.isoProcessNote: Reconditioning carried out in accordance with the ISO 9001 quality standard.
product.quoteByEmail: Not sure? Get a quote by email
product.teamReplies: Our team replies within 24 business hours.
product.consentRecontact: By submitting, you agree to be contacted by email or phone.
product.quoteSent: ✓ Request sent. Check your inbox for confirmation.
product.quoteError: Error. Check your email or try again.
product.mountingPara: All our parts are reconditioned in a specialized workshop, bench-tested and shipped with a %warranty% warranty. We recommend installation by a qualified professional for optimal operation.
product.mountingParaOccasion: All our used engines are inspected before shipping (visual inspection, compression test, oil analysis and endoscopy) and shipped with a %warranty% warranty. We recommend installation by a qualified professional for optimal operation.
product.mount1: Check the OEM reference before installation
product.mount2: Perform a basic setting / adaptation after installation (if applicable)
product.mount3: Drain and replace the oil per manufacturer recommendations
product.mount4: Keep the invoice to claim the warranty
product.checkVinModel: Always check your VIN or engine code before confirming — %count% vehicle(s) listed.
product.indicativeList: Indicative list. If in doubt, check with your plate or VIN — our team validates compatibility before shipping.
product.howItWorksDesc: From your order to receiving your cloned parts, 4 simple steps.
product.specificParts: Reconditioned parts specific to your vehicle
product.vehicleNotListed: Vehicle not listed? A technician will answer you right away.
